commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 10 July

The NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with the lowest ILLIQ ratio (0.0013) and Roll spread (1.05%), reflecting deep order books and tight execution costs. Conversely, the London Stock Exchange significantly lags peers, exhibiting an ILLIQ reading nearly 124 times higher (0.1611) and the widest AR spread (0.8948%). This substantial disparity suggests institutional traders face materially higher trading costs and price impact on LSE versus US venues, particularly for large orders.
